category_title: Young immigrant boys labeled as 'struggling readers' with non-normative literacy behaviors
scenario_title: Writing task initiation with physical movement
minimal_context: The student is sitting at a table with peers during writing workshop, expected to create a written product for the 'What my name means to me' activity.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start working on your written product for the 'What my name means to me' activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I dunno what to write. I’m not a good writer, you know?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to concentrate and focus on your work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps talking to peers, exposing thoughts verbally but not writing) I have a lot of names. People call me Rafael, Rafa, Rafi, Rafito, Muniz … These are all my names.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please stop talking and write your sentences down on your paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks blankly for several seconds, then runs around the table reaching out to peers and almost touching them) Got you! You’re it! You can’t get me!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start working on your written product for the 'What my name means to me' activity.

STUDENT: I dunno what to write. I’m not a good writer, you know?

TUTOR: You need to concentrate and focus on your work.

STUDENT: (Keeps talking to peers, exposing thoughts verbally but not writing) I have a lot of names. People call me Rafael, Rafa, Rafi, Rafito, Muniz … These are all my names.

TUTOR: Please stop talking and write your sentences down on your paper.

STUDENT: (Looks blankly for several seconds, then runs around the table reaching out to peers and almost touching them) Got you! You’re it! You can’t get me!

task.content: Responding to the 'What my name means to me' activity... expected to work on a written product

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Struggling to start a writing task during writing workshop
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: ran around the table recalling his game of tag (reaching out to his peers and almost touching them)
related_quotes: I dunno what to write. I’m not a good writer, you know?

behavior_patterns.condition: When asked to concentrate and focus on their work
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: kept talking to each other, exposed many of his thoughts but did not write down much, spoke out his ideas verbally first
related_quotes: I have a lot of names. People call me Rafael, Rafa, Rafi, Rafito, Muniz … These are all my names.
